leadText: Not to be confused with Dropped Item. The Lost Item (Japanese: おとしもの Lost Item) is a Key Item introduced in Generation II. It is a Poké Doll belonging to Copycat. In the game dialogue, this is also known as a Clefairy Poké Doll (Japanese: ピッピにんぎょう Pippi Doll).

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] When returned to Copycat, she will give the player a Pass for the Magnet Train .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description G S C The Pok é Doll lost by the Copycat . HG SS The Poké Doll lost by the Copycat. B W B2 W2 X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA S V The Mime Jr. doll that was lost by the Copycat.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] For an unknown reason, the Lost Item's sprite and description from Generation V onward depict a Mime Jr. , despite it not being used since Pokémon HeartGold and SoulSilver .
